Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) Since all resources are tenancy scoped, this is the tenancy OCID where the capacity request is created.
  • namespace - (Required) The OCI service namespace for the capacity request.
  • region - (Required) The region for which the capacity request is made.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) The display name of the capacity request.
  • date_expected_capacity_handover - (Required) The date by which the requested capacity is expected to be handed over.
  • details - (Required) The requested capacity detail entries for the request.
  • occ_availability_catalog_id - (Optional) The OCID of the availability catalog against which the capacity request is made.
  • request_type - (Optional) The type of capacity request.
  • description - (Optional) Meaningful text about the capacity request.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • availability_domain - (Optional) The availability domain for the capacity request.
  • request_state - (Optional) (Updatable) The desired request state. Supported updates are SUBMITTED and CANCELLED.
